title: SLO Compliance Check
description:
Each line is `timestamp\t1|0` (tab-separated, 1 = success). SLO target is 99.9%. Return three lines:

```
success_rate N.NN
met_slo true|false
error_budget_remaining N.NN
```

error_budget_remaining = (1 - 0.999) * 100 - (100 - success_rate). All floats to 2dp.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: 80% success, misses SLO
